inputs.label: Current Year
inputs.businessContext: Calendar year of the current date

inputs.label: Current Month
inputs.businessContext: Month number of the current date (1-12)

inputs.label: Current Day
inputs.businessContext: Day of month of the current date (1-31)

inputs.label: Fiscal Year Start Month
inputs.businessContext: Month when the fiscal year begins

inputs.label: Fiscal Year Start Day
inputs.businessContext: Day when the fiscal year begins

formulas.fiscalYear: (currentMonth < fiscalStartMonth || (currentMonth === fiscalStartMonth && currentDay < fiscalStartDay)) ? currentYear - 1 : currentYear
